title: Relaxdays 2x sack truck wheel, puncture-proof solid rubber tires, 4.1/3.5-4”, 16 mm axle, up to 150 kg, 260x85 mm, black-red
features: Set of 2:2 tubeless spare wheels in black/red - also suitable for handcarts, handcarts and much more
Made of solid rubber: polyurethane (PU) rubber wheel - weather-resistant wheel with approx. 150 kg load capacity
Puncture-proof: durable tire without air - resistant to nails, shards and rubbish
With ball bearing: movable sack truck wheel 4.1/3.5-4” with coloured plastic rim - shock-resistant
Details: complete wheel dimensions D x W: approx. 260 x 85 mm - axle D: approx. 16 mm - hub length: approx. 55 mm
description: From the manufacturer Home, Garden and Leisure Relaxdays features a large variety of creative goods with a focus on household, garden and leisure products. German brand A large variety of products Reliable and committed Styles for every taste 10 years' experience Set of 2 PU Wheelbarrow Tyres 4.1/3.5-4 These 2 pneumatic cart wheels in size 4.1/3.5-4 are the perfect replacement tyres for your home wheelbarrow. Since these tyres and made from solid PU rubber and have no air inside, they are resistant to thorns, nails and other sharp items. What is more, these rubber wheels are also always ready to go, since there is no danger of air loss over time. The ball bearings and tread on these wheels ensure your wheelbarrow is easy to push around. Tyre: 4.1/3.5-4 Wheel diameter: approx. 26 cm Wheel width: approx. 8.5 cm Max. load capacity: approx. 150 kg Weight: approx. 850 g Material: PU rubber, plastic Various colours Spare Tyre Set for Hand Carts and More Solid rubber tyres with plastic rims Spare tyre for wheelbarrows, garden carts etc. Practical set of 2 without air - use immediately Puncture-Proof Rubber Tyres Size of tyre in detail Inner diameter of axle: approx. 1.6 cm Hub length: approx. 5.5 cm Rim diameter: approx. 11.5 cm Durable and resistant to debris Ball bearing for easy handling Tread with block pattern for more driving control Included in Delivery 2 x wheelbarrow wheel Decorative items are not included in delivery
